body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: agent_datacenter → UnseenUniversity rename
body.description:
**What changed:** agent_datacenter repo and local directory renamed to UnseenUniversity; all string refs updated.

**Predicted unintended effects:**
- Scripts in TheIgors with hardcoded /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter paths break silently
- Igor palace nodes referencing agent_datacenter paths become stale
- Shell aliases or tmux session configs still pointing to old path cause confusing failures
- Any automation (cron, CI) referencing old GitHub URL fails if not using the redirect
- THEIGORS_HOME or CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS env vars may reference ADC path indirectly

**Signals to watch:** Shell errors referencing agent_datacenter path in TheIgors venv or scripts; ADC device logs showing path-not-found errors; igor.switches.cfg or .env files with stale paths.

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-07.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
